notes:
Physical arrangement of the cabin's slowstock shelf. Two shelves, each ~16 slots wide. Positions are (shelf_index, slot_index) with shelf_index 0 = top shelf, 1 = bottom. Some slots hold Betamax cases (Olaf's habit) rather than bare cartridges — the case flag drives the shelf renderer.

Sticks not in this file exist only as reference stubs and don't take a physical slot. Empty slots on the shelf are intentional — Olaf's shelf was, in the Vol 7 present, only about 65% full.

shelf.location: the cabin's living room, west wall, above the record player

entries.prior_owner_note: Camp Sweetgum's cart · Olaf, from the 2011 console-lot auction · Sam's 1988 save still on it

empty_slots.note: A dust rectangle where a stick used to be.  Nobody remembers what it was.
A stack of 5.25-inch floppies, taped shut, sharpied 'do not put on the shelf but I do not know where to put them.' — Olaf, undated
A Betamax tape labeled 'C.C. Bailey — Kestrel commentary '11.'  Not a slowstick.  Nobody has watched it.
A copy of *Kentucky Route Zero* on a USB drive.  Not a slowstick.  Not from Olaf.  Handwritten label reads 'from Kai, 2044.'
